heroSub: Custom websites, SEO, and branding for the shops, restaurants, and service businesses of Rutherfordton and the foothills of Rutherford County. No templates, no lock-in, and you own every line of it.
localH2: Built for Rutherfordton and the county it anchors.
localP1: Rutherfordton became the county seat in 1787 on 50 acres along Cleghorn Creek, named for Revolutionary War general Griffith Rutherford. The town sits at the heart of western North Carolina's gold country, where the Bechtler Mint struck the nation's first private dollar gold coins starting in 1832. From 1831 to 1840, the Bechtlers minted over $2.24 million in gold as miners from across the region brought their ore to town.
localP2: We build for the people who run this town: the Main Street shop owner, the restaurant opening downtown, the professional practice and the service business keeping the foothills moving. Your website is designed and coded around your customers, not stamped out of a template.
mapMetaLine: Serving Rutherfordton, Forest City, Shelby, Morganton & the foothills
